page_content:
Formerly: EDCP789Q.

EDCP745 Supervision of Counseling (3 Credits)

Survey of knowledge base, research approaches, and applied skills in supervision of counseling.

Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department; and must be in a major within EDUC- Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department.

EDCP746 Clinical Supervision of Pupil Personnel Services (3 Credits) Supervision of role of psychologists and counselors in school settings; applied skills in supervision of services.
